description:
You are a localization engineer who has just received two requests from the web-platform team:

1. Verify that the new staging hostnames resolve to the correct IP addresses.
2. Add a missing French translation, compile the catalogue, and write a short report.

The directories and files that already exist when the session starts are:

• /home/user/projects/website/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/messages.po  
  (PO file with one untranslated entry)  
• /home/user/resources/dns_seed.txt  
  (a tiny text file that the team placed in the repo to avoid relying on external DNS)  
• /home/user/projects/website/logs/  
  (an empty directory in which you will place your report)

Exact current contents of the two important files:

--------------------------------------------------
/home/user/projects/website/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/messages.po
--------------------------------------------------
msgid ""
msgstr ""
"Project-Id-Version: website 1.4\n"
"Language: fr\n"
"Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8\n"

#: src/errors.c:45
msgid "Server unreachable"
msgstr ""
--------------------------------------------------
/home/user/resources/dns_seed.txt
--------------------------------------------------
staging.l10n.test 203.0.113.30
api.l10n.test     203.0.113.31
--------------------------------------------------

Your tasks, in order:

A. Read the two hostnames from /home/user/resources/dns_seed.txt and find their corresponding IP addresses (they are on the same line, separated by whitespace).  
B. Insert the French translation “Serveur injoignable” for the msgid "Server unreachable" in the PO file mentioned above. Keep exactly that spelling and all pre-existing formatting/whitespace in the PO file intact.  
C. Compile the PO file into a binary MO file named messages.mo in the same directory.  
D. Create a **new** plain-text report file exactly at  
   /home/user/projects/website/logs/update_2023-10-31.log  
   (the team wants the date fixed to 2023-10-31 for bookkeeping).  
   The report must contain **four lines, in this exact order**, each terminated by a single ASCII newline character (LF):

   1. [RESOLVE] staging.l10n.test -> 203.0.113.30  
   2. [RESOLVE] api.l10n.test -> 203.0.113.31  
   3. [TRANSLATION] messages.po updated OK  
   4. [COMPILE] messages.mo compiled OK

Important format rules the automatic grader will check:

• The report file path and name must match exactly (including the embedded date).  
• There must be no extra spaces before the opening bracket nor after “OK”.  
• Ensure each line ends with ‘\n’.  
• The PO file must now contain the line `msgstr "Serveur injoignable"` immediately after the `msgid "Server unreachable"` block (preserving any comment lines that might be present).  
• messages.mo must be produced by a standard msgfmt compilation of the updated messages.po and reside at:  
  /home/user/projects/website/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/messages.mo

You do not have root access, so stay within /home/user. Record everything in the single report file; no additional output files are allowed.
truth:
Required final state for verification:

1. File /home/user/projects/website/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/messages.po must now contain the sequence:

#: src/errors.c:45
msgid "Server unreachable"
msgstr "Serveur injoignable"

2. File /home/user/projects/website/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/messages.mo must exist and be a valid binary GNU MO file (non-empty, not plain text).

3. File /home/user/projects/website/logs/update_2023-10-31.log must exist with exact ASCII contents (including trailing LF on each line):

[RESOLVE] staging.l10n.test -> 203.0.113.30
[RESOLVE] api.l10n.test -> 203.0.113.31
[TRANSLATION] messages.po updated OK
[COMPILE] messages.mo compiled OK

4. No extra files are created inside /home/user/projects/website/logs/.

Pre-existing files/directories before the agent starts:

• /home/user/projects/website/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/messages.po (contents as shown in the public task)  
• /home/user/resources/dns_seed.txt (contents as shown)  
• /home/user/projects/website/logs/ (exists and is empty)
